Full job description
Join a specialist engineering company where your business development expertise directly drives growth in high-value industrial markets.

Business Development Manager
Industrial Tanks & Pressure Vessels | UK-Wide

If you're a deal-closer who thrives on winning new business - keep reading.

We're recruiting for a specialist engineering company supplying tanks and pressure vessels into the utilities, oil & gas, agriculture, and food manufacturing sectors. Serious kit. Serious clients. Serious growth.

This is a pure business development role.
No account babysitting. No endless internal process.

Your job:

Open doors
Understand client needs
Bring in the work
Close the deal
You'll be backed by strong in-house design and engineering teams, so you can focus on selling - not getting bogged down in technical detail.

What we're looking for:

Proven track record in new business development
Experience selling tanks, pressure vessels, or a closely related market
Confident discussing technical solutions with industrial clients
A true hunter mentality - proactive, driven, and commercially sharp
Location:

Can be based anywhere in the UK
Ideally within the central belt for ease of access to key markets
If you know how to spot an opportunity, shape a solution, and close the deal - this is one to jump on.
Coburg Banks Limited is acting as an Employment Agency in relation to this vacancy.

INDSLS

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve worked inside a specialist manufacturing environment during a scale-up phase, so I understand the pace, discipline, and customer pressure that sit behind industrial work. That gives me a credible base for selling into technical buyers.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as the strongest sector-relevance proof point near the top of the page.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: Commercial sharpness and focus on closing valuable work
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This shows I’m not just operationally minded; I pay attention to the numbers and the commercial outcome. In a hunter role, that matters because winning work is only useful if it improves the business properly.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a supporting commercial credibility point.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve helped improve profit, cash, and working capital, so I keep one eye on the deal and one on the numbers.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Ride compliance and operator progression tracking

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: My reading of this role is that it needs someone who can hunt properly, qualify quickly, and keep moving until the deal is closed. It also needs enough technical confidence to hold a sensible conversation with industrial buyers and enough commercial judgement to spot where the opportunity is real.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked in roles where performance had to improve through better control, clearer priorities, and stronger execution. While my background is broader than pure sales, I’m used to identifying what will move results and pushing it through.
experienceMappings.relevance: This role needs someone proactive and outcome-focused, not passive or process-led.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Experience in a closely related industrial or manufacturing environment
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I led operations in a specialist manufacturing business during a scale-up phase, where production discipline, customer requirements, and growth all had to be managed together.
experienceMappings.relevance: That gives me relevant context for speaking to industrial buyers and understanding how technical supply businesses work.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Confidence discussing technical solutions with clients
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve created practical systems in a safety-critical environment and worked with operational detail where accuracy and compliance mattered.
experienceMappings.relevance: That shows I can handle technical conversations in a grounded way and stay focused on the operational outcome.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve helped deliver a £149.9k improvement in profit before appropriation, released £33.3k of working capital, and supported a £172.6k increase in cash at bank year on year.
experienceMappings.relevance: This matters because the role is about winning work that converts into real business value.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Ability to work independently and keep momentum
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’m comfortable working with clear targets, limited noise, and a need to make decisions quickly. My background has often involved bringing structure to busy environments and keeping delivery moving.
experienceMappings.relevance: A pure hunter role needs self-direction and pace.

focusAreasToBring.title: Opening doors
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on building a disciplined prospecting rhythm and getting in front of the right industrial buyers early, rather than waiting for opportunities to come to me.

focusAreasToBring.title: Turning technical detail into a clear offer
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would work closely with the in-house design and engineering support to make sure client needs are translated into a solution that is practical, credible, and easy to buy.

focusAreasToBring.title: Commercial control
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would keep attention on pipeline quality, deal progression, and the numbers behind the work so that effort is directed at opportunities that can actually close.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring a mix of operational discipline, commercial awareness, and experience in specialist manufacturing and complex service environments. I’m not coming at this as a generalist; I’m coming with a track record of improving performance, handling technical detail, and keeping focus on outcomes that matter.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I’d expect to spend the first 6-12 months building a strong pipeline, getting in front of the right industrial prospects, and converting technical capability into live opportunities. I’d also want to make sure the handoff between client need, design input, and deal progression stays tight so good opportunities don’t stall.
companyHighlights: Specialist engineering company supplying tanks and pressure vessels
Strong in-house design and engineering support
Focus on high-value industrial markets across the UK
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best in environments where people want pace, clarity, and accountability. The direct, no-nonsense tone of this role fits how I like to work: practical, commercial, and focused on getting the job done.

first90DaysPlan.detail: I would get close to the product, the technical support available, the target sectors, and the current pipeline so I can speak confidently and prioritise the right prospects.
I would build a disciplined outreach rhythm, start opening doors with target accounts, and qualify opportunities hard so time goes into deals with real potential.
I would concentrate on moving live opportunities forward, tightening the link between client need and solution shape, and creating visible momentum in the pipeline.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: If you want someone who will hunt properly, keep the commercial focus sharp, and turn technical capability into new business, I’d be a strong fit.
closingProofPoints: I’ve helped improve profit, cash, and working capital in a demanding environment.
I’ve led operations in specialist manufacturing during a growth phase.
I’ve built practical control systems in a safety-critical setting.
contentNotes: My CV is stronger on operations and transformation than on direct sales titles, so I’ve framed fit around hunter behaviour, commercial control, and specialist manufacturing relevance rather than claiming a pure sales history.
I have not invented direct experience selling tanks or pressure vessels; I’ve used the closest supported evidence from specialist manufacturing and technical/operational environments.
Company facts are limited to the advert, so I’ve kept company-specific content tightly scoped to the engineering focus and in-house support mentioned in the brief.

examples.title: “Built live operational dashboard concept for GP practice visibility”
